market_pulse: EDC Week dominates all Las Vegas venues; LIV leads with Tiësto, David Guetta, and Dom Dolla momentum; competitors (Encore, Zouk, Hakkasan, OMNIA) pushing high-profile lineups but LIV maintains social engagement edge.
